name: Buffet Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds hash browns, thawed for 45 minutes
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together well except bread crumbs.
2. Place mixture in a 13 x 9 inch pan or Pyrex dish.
3. Sprinkle with bread crumbs.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour.
5. Serves approximately 10.
